creator: charnier@xp11.frmug.org
text:
The file index.so need to be created before paper.ascii.gz. When using
make -j4, index.so is made too late.

Fix: 

.ORDER: index.so paper.ascii.gz doesn't work.
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/src/share/doc/usd/13.viref
	make cleandir obj
	make -j4

soelim: index.so: No such file or directory
<standard input>:8242: can't open `index.so': No such file or directory
